summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Wasteland Zero roguelite RPG. Character creation flow and UI work excellently with comic-style design. Movement system functional but critical combat trigger bug persists - no fight tiles are accessible for combat despite map generation working.

critical_bugs.issue: No fight tiles are generated as adjacent/accessible tiles for combat encounters
critical_bugs.impact: Game-breaking - core combat gameplay remains inaccessible despite movement working
critical_bugs.details: Player can move around map and access town tiles, but no fight/elite/boss tiles appear as adjacent or clickable. Map shows 48 unexplored tiles but 0 adjacent tiles, preventing combat encounters.

integration_issues.issue: Fight tiles not being marked as accessible despite being present in map data
integration_issues.details: All 48 non-current tiles remain unexplored with no adjacent tiles showing, suggesting tile accessibility logic is broken

passed_tests: Title screen loads with excellent comic-style design (WASTELAND ZERO title with glow effects)
Save slot selection screen with 3 slots working perfectly
Complete character creation flow working flawlessly:
- Name input with hardcore mode option
- Race selection: 5 races (Human, Ghoul, Mutant, Android, Psyker) with detailed stat bonuses
- Archetype selection: Multiple classes (Warrior, Scavenger, Doc, Grunt, Sniper) with starting equipment
- Trait selection: 8+ traits (Glass Cannon, Lucky Devil, Iron Skin, Quick Draw, etc.) with effects
Map screen displays with comic-style 7x7 grid correctly
Character info display working (name, level, HP 155/155, XP, caps)
Map legend shows tile types (Fight, Elite, Boss, Town, Dungeon, Loot)
Character stats display (STR, AGI, INT, END, LCK) working
Movement system functional - player can click and move to tiles
Town screen accessible and working with shop functionality
Town shop shows items with caps prices (healing items, weapons, etc.)
Comic-style UI design excellent throughout all screens
Navigation buttons and screen transitions working

success_percentage.frontend: 80% - Excellent UI/UX and character creation, movement works, but combat inaccessible due to tile generation issue

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Combat remains inaccessible due to map tile generation issue. The movement system works (player can move to town tiles), but no fight/elite/boss tiles are being marked as adjacent or accessible. Investigation needed into: 1) Map generation logic ensuring fight tiles are created, 2) Tile accessibility calculation (getAdjacentTiles function), 3) Tile type marking system. The core issue is that players cannot access combat encounters despite the combat system being implemented.
